channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large tree, 8th May
item.description:
Large tree overhanging road/crescent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anlaby Court, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary flail may be required 123mtrs Stop and go with footway closure TM From /// round.retire.scam to mini roundabout (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May
item.description:
Cut overhanging branches for visibility of traffic signal head 20mtrs Stop and go TM Outside Kings Head (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary 9mtrs Stop and go TM Outside Tithe barn (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 8th May
item.description:
Permanent Repair CWED 1200 x 500 x 93mm Marked as X Road Closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 8th May
item.description:
ENWD CWED 1200 x 500 x 93mm Marked as X Road Closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 8th May
item.description:
Take up and lay new kerb 225mm x 125mm x 990mm Give and take TM Outside number 6 (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rookery road park - rubbish everywhere, 8th May
item.description:
Rubbish littered all through the park due to bins not being emptied/overflow. Antisocial behaviour has also involved a Tesco trolley being placed onto the children’s roundabout so unable to use.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th May
item.description:
CWPH 800 x 300 x 45mm Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th May
item.description:
CWPH 600 x 300 x 50mm Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large wooden planter full of weeds. Either it should be removed as an unsightly obstruction on the pavement or it should be planted and maintained. Thanks, 8th May
item.description:
Opposite The Bank House Wetherspoons in Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15-21, Clarence Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 8th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 400mm x 300mm x 45mm Stop and go TM Outside number 151 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rookery road park rubbish everywhere, 8th May
item.description:
Rookery road park rubbish everywhere due to bin overflow and anti social behaviour, also a Tesco trolley that has been put on the children’s roundabout.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 8th May
item.description:
CW Depression ENWD inquiry sent to AHR possible sink hole 1000mm x 900mm x 85mm Give and take TM Outside number 25 (CW10 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hanging trees, 8th May
item.description:
Low hanging trees over the road hitting the waste trucks causing poor visibility and could cause damage to the trucks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Pilford Avenue, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
